description: A user is trying to reset their password but is not receiving the password reset email.

nodes.task_description: Verify the user's email address on the account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the email address the user is checking is the one registered to the account.

nodes.task_description: Check the email delivery logs for the password reset email.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the email was successfully sent from the system but was marked as 'spam' by the recipient's email provider.

nodes.task_description: Instruct the user to check their spam/junk folder and to whitelist the product's email address.

expected_outcome.value: User finds the email in their spam folder and successfully resets their password.
